SHORT NAME: ESCALATIONS 
LONG NAME: ESCALATIONS 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
FILE(S): 
Hospital 
SOURCE: 
AHCAH facility-submitted data 
VALUES: 
0, 1+ 

COMMENT: 
Occasionally a negative value may appear in a data submission; theses are corrections to prior data. 
Data users should interpret the negative values to mean zero (no escalations).
